data.text: THIN-ATMOSPHERE MOON OF DESPOTIC POWER ON EKA29. SO NAMED BECAUSE
UNDERNEATH ITS DARK CLOUDS THERE SEEMS TO LIE A BRIGHT RED GROUND.
*NOTE* THIS IS NOT THE CASE. UPON LANDING I ENCOUNTERED ONE OF THE
DARKEST PLANETS I HAVE EVER BEEN ON. I WAS LUCKY TO MAKE IT BACK.
ONLY THE OVERLY CURIOUS AND THE IDIOTS WOULD LAND ON THIS PLANET.
REMEMBER, CURIOSITY KILLED THE CAT-BASED CREATURE. --EKA
